hero.title: Premium Cleaning Services
hero.description: Reliable and high-quality cleaning for homes and offices. We focus on precision, quality, and your complete satisfaction.

sustainable.title: Sustainable
sustainable.text: We use eco-friendly, plant-based cleaning solutions that are safe for everyone.

ethical.title: Punctual
ethical.text: Our team of professionals ensures timely arrival and consistent scheduling for a service you can set your clock to.

detail.title: Quality
detail.text: We pay close attention to every detail, ensuring your space is always spotless and organized.

residential.title: Home Cleaning
residential.text: Standard cleaning services tailored for modern homes.

commercial.title: Office Cleaning
commercial.text: Professional hygiene solutions for businesses and studios.

deep.title: Deep Cleaning
deep.text: A comprehensive deep clean for a complete reset of your environment.

vetted.title: Vetted Staff
vetted.text: Rigorous background checks and professional training for all employees.

eco.title: Eco-friendly
eco.text: Safe, biodegradable formulas for children, pets, and all surfaces.

satisfaction.title: Guaranteed Results
satisfaction.text: A flawless finish or a complimentary return within 24 hours.

pricing.title: Flat Rates
pricing.text: Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Details about our services and policies.
faq.not_found_title: Can't find what you're looking for?

items.q: What cleaning products do you use?
items.a: We use eco-friendly, plant-based formulas that are biodegradable and safe for all surfaces, children, and pets.

items.q: Do I need to be present during the cleaning?
items.a: No, most of our clients provide key access. Our staff are trained to work independently and respect your privacy.

items.q: How do I book a cleaning session?
items.a: You can book directly via our contact form or by phone. We will confirm your appointment and provide a transparent quote within 24 hours.

items.q: Are your cleaning agents safe for pets?
items.a: Yes, we exclusively use 100% organic, non-toxic agents that are completely safe for pets, children, and people with allergies.

items.q: What areas in Oslo do you serve?
items.a: We provide premium cleaning services across all major districts of Oslo and the surrounding Viken area.

footer.description: Professional cleaning services in Oslo. Focused on quality, reliability, and attention to detail.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by home and business owners in Oslo.

items.quote: Anka Renhold AS stepped in at very short notice. I was extremely impressed by their thoroughness; they truly know their craft. Communication was seamless from start to finish.
items.author: Karoline H.

items.quote: This is the second time I've used Anka Renhold. The work quality is fantastic, and they are incredibly pleasant to deal with! Highly recommended for anyone needing professional cleaning.
items.author: Magnus Solberg

items.quote: I have never had such clean windows before! I warmly recommend Anka Renhold for their quick communication and superb window cleaning quality. Tidy, friendly, and reliable.
items.author: Siri Jensen

items.quote: They delivered high quality on my move-out cleaning. They handled specific requirements with ease and completed the work efficiently and with great precision. Very happy with the result!
items.author: Anders Berg

items.quote: Very satisfied! The entire process was orderly and they are super friendly. Efficient execution with no hidden costs like parking or tolls. Just an honest hourly rate!
items.author: Emilie Foss

items.quote: Excellent communication before and during the job. They do very thorough work and are both efficient and flexible. The whole experience was very professional and we are very pleased.
items.author: Thomas Dahl
